headlines.title: Pugnacious, charismatic and she always answered the question - Chris Mason on Ann Widdecombe
headlines.description: Plenty in Westminster who knew her, whether they agreed with her or not, found her immensely likeable.

headlines.title: US wants Iran to pledge to stop shooting at ships in Strait of Hormuz

headlines.title: Spain battles to contain one of its deadliest wildfires as at least 12 killed
headlines.description: At least four Britons are believed to be among the victims of the blaze, which left another 23 people missing.

headlines.title: Chaos and confusion reign as Harry loses media battle

headlines.title: Meet the crypto billionaires building a world where money buys you a vote
headlines.description: They think democracy has run its course - so they're setting up their own nations instead.

headlines.title: Artificial turf & coaching revolution - how Norway shaped golden generation

headlines.title: England's Guehi, Rice & James all train before Norway game

headlines.title: See if you can spot an AI deepfake with our test

headlines.title: Snow Patrol on 20 years of Chasing Cars, and their 'non-duet' with Kylie
headlines.description: The band look back on their biggest hit, and explain why their new single with Kylie isn't a duet.
